name: Cucumber and Bread Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 pickling cucumbers, cut into 3/4 inch chunks
1/2 cup green olives, pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Spread the bread cubes on a tray and allow to dry thoroughly for 1 to 2 hours, or in an oven preheated to 250°F for 30 to 45 minutes.
3. In a bowl, mix together the cucumbers, onion, tomatoes, olives, and cheese.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (red wine vinegar, olive oil, cilantro, salt, and black pepper) to the bowl with the vegetables.
5. Toss well, cover, and chill for 30 minutes.
6. Serve cold on lettuce-lined plates.
